screenshots.howReached: Started a rogue run, descended once, and opened the live journal current section.
screenshots.whyCaptured: Captures how clearly the current run build panel forecasts floor rewards.

screenshots.howReached: Opened a staged live perk draft containing Quick Hands.
screenshots.whyCaptured: Shows whether the perk communicates a real, differentiated progression payoff.

screenshots.howReached: Opened a staged live relic draft containing Greedy Purse.
screenshots.whyCaptured: Shows whether the relic communicates an actual economy-versus-pressure tradeoff.

stagingNotes: Journal captures are staged on the first dungeon floor with visibility forced on so reward-preview copy is readable in one frame.
Perk and relic choice modals are staged from the live runtime using representative option sets tied to the audit changes.
The same capture script is run once before the fixes and once after the fixes.
